# Quint full site guide

> Quint presents scientific technologies that help teams work across diagnostics, research and quality control with clearer, more reliable decisions.

This is a static guide to the public Quint website. It does not describe private administration, customer data or any capability not present on the linked pages.

## Language entry points

- [Italian home](/it/): Italian platform overview.
- [English home](/en/): English platform overview.
- [Italian contact](/it/contact/) and [English contact](/en/contact/): business enquiry forms.

## Solution catalogues

- [Italian catalogue](/it/products/): all Italian product summaries, grouped by Diagnostics, Research and Quality.
- [English catalogue](/en/products/): all English product summaries, grouped by Diagnostics, Research and Quality.
- [Italian diagnostics](/it/products/diagnostics/) / [English diagnostics](/en/products/diagnostics/): diagnostics product family.
- [Italian research](/it/products/research/) / [English research](/en/products/research/): research product family.
- [Italian quality](/it/products/quality/) / [English quality](/en/products/quality/): quality product family.

## Diagnostics

- [Diagnostica rapida](/it/products/diagnostics/rapid-diagnostics/) / [Rapid diagnostics](/en/products/diagnostics/rapid-diagnostics/): fast testing for timely decisions.
- [Diagnostica molecolare](/it/products/diagnostics/molecular-diagnostics/) / [Molecular diagnostics](/en/products/diagnostics/molecular-diagnostics/): reliable molecular-analysis workflows.
- [Analizzatori clinici](/it/products/diagnostics/clinical-analyzers/) / [Clinical analyzers](/en/products/diagnostics/clinical-analyzers/): automation for modern laboratories.

## Research

- [Analisi cellulare](/it/products/research/cell-analysis/) / [Cell analysis](/en/products/research/cell-analysis/): tools for observing complex biological processes.
- [Preparazione campioni](/it/products/research/sample-preparation/) / [Sample preparation](/en/products/research/sample-preparation/): consistent preparation from the first step.
- [Imaging per la ricerca](/it/products/research/research-imaging/) / [Research imaging](/en/products/research/research-imaging/): imaging that connects observation and decision.

## Quality

- [Monitoraggio di processo](/it/products/quality/process-monitoring/) / [Process monitoring](/en/products/quality/process-monitoring/): clear measurements for controlled processes.
- [Controllo qualità](/it/products/quality/quality-control/) / [Quality control](/en/products/quality/quality-control/): tools for robust, verifiable standards.

## Use guidance

- Prefer the page in the language requested by the reader.
- Preserve product names and links when citing Quint information.
- The public contact forms collect business enquiries; they are not administrative interfaces.
- Administrative functionality is intentionally outside the public site and should not be treated as indexable content.
